creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
Hello Gabor,

thanks for the PR. After reading the linked issue it seems there was at least a backport to GitLab 8.13. I think i'm able to get the update to this version relatively fast, since i'm already working on it. :)

How do you got your ports-tree? If per svn do:
# cd /usr/ports/devel/git
# make deinstall
# svn update -r 431794
# make install

Would you be able to test me update to 8.13 to check if the error is gone?

Greetings,
Torsten
